core_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Combine chat UI with dense dashboard history and Swiss brutalist typography.
Emotion First: The UI should feel authoritative, objective, and lightning fast.
Content is king: The chat history and AI results are the focal points.
Negative Space: Use generous padding around the chat input and messages to give breathing room.
Contrast: Stark white background, sharp black borders, and signal colors for state.

scales.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-black tracking-tighter leading-none
scales.code: text-sm font-mono bg-zinc-100 p-1 border border-zinc-300

spacing_and_layout.generous_spacing: Use p-6, p-8, p-12 for containers.
spacing_and_layout.bento_grid: For history of results, use a tight dashboard grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-6. Each past result is a clean rectangular block with a solid border.
spacing_and_layout.chat_layout: Center-aligned main column for chat max-w-4xl, with a fixed sidebar for history (w-72). Use flex-1 for the chat view to push the input to the bottom.
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Left-align dense text and messages. User messages can be right-aligned with black background, AI messages left-aligned with white background and solid black border.

buttons.primary: bg-[#002FA7] text-white hover:bg-[#002FA7]/90 rounded-none px-6 py-3 font-bold uppercase tracking-wide transition-all border-2 border-transparent focus:border-black
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border-2 border-black text-black hover:bg-black hover:text-white rounded-none px-6 py-3 font-bold uppercase transition-all
buttons.icon: p-3 border-2 border-transparent hover:border-black transition-all rounded-none bg-zinc-100 hover:bg-zinc-200
buttons.whatsapp: bg-[#25D366] text-white hover:bg-[#25D366]/90 border-2 border-[#25D366] hover:border-black flex items-center gap-2 rounded-none px-4 py-2 font-bold uppercase

inputs.text: border-2 border-black focus:ring-0 focus:outline-none rounded-none bg-white p-4 w-full text-lg placeholder:text-zinc-500
inputs.multimodal_container: relative border-2 border-black bg-white shadow-[6px_6px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)] flex flex-col p-4 transition-all focus-within:translate-x-[2px] focus-within:translate-y-[2px] focus-within:shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)]

cards.history_item: border-2 border-black bg-white p-4 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)] transition-all cursor-pointer
cards.result_block: border-2 border-black bg-zinc-50 p-6 my-4 shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)]

badges.audio: bg-[#FF2400] text-white text-xs font-mono uppercase px-2 py-1 border border-black
badges.image: bg-[#002FA7] text-white text-xs font-mono uppercase px-2 py-1 border border-black
badges.text: bg-black text-white text-xs font-mono uppercase px-2 py-1 border border-black

image_urls.description: Abstract geometric pattern for the login page background, applied to the right half of the split screen layout.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Hard shadows that compress on click. E.g., shadow-[6px_6px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)] becomes shadow-[2px_2px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)] with translate-y-[4px] and translate-x-[4px].
motion_and_interactions.recording_state: Pulse animation on microphone icon when recording, using Signal Red #FF2400, adding a border-red-500 to the container.

specific_views.login: Split screen layout. Left: minimal login form with absolute center alignment, 'Sign in with Google' prominent button (black outline style). Right: the abstract geometric image filling the pane. Title: 'Omni' in Outfit Black 6xl.
specific_views.main_chat: Two-pane layout. Left Sidebar (History): Light grey background #F9F9F9, right border 2px solid black. Main Area: White background. Bottom anchored input area with buttons for image upload, audio record, and submit. The multimodal input area uses the brutalist shadow.
specific_views.message_bubbles: User: Right aligned, max-w-[80%], black background, white text, 0px border radius. AI: Left aligned, max-w-[85%], white background, black text, 2px solid black border, 0px border radius.
specific_views.share_whatsapp: A prominent WhatsApp green button attached to each AI response block footer, floating right.

accessibility.contrast: All text maintains minimum 4.5:1 ratio. Heavy use of black on white and white on black.
accessibility.focus: Focus states use 2px solid black outline or background color inversion.
accessibility.test_attributes: All interactive elements must have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='mic-button', data-testid='chat-input', data-testid='upload-image-button', data-testid='whatsapp-share-button', data-testid='login-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: Use Phosphor Icons for all UI icons (Microphone, Image, PaperPlaneRight, WhatsappLogo, SignOut, etc.). E.g., yarn add @phosphor-icons/react
Install Google Fonts 'Outfit' and 'IBM Plex Sans' in index.html or global css.

Build the application using pure Tailwind CSS and standard React components. If using Shadcn UI, aggressively customize the border-radius to 0px (rounded-none) and borders to 2px solid black for the neo-brutalist/Swiss feel.
Ensure the audio transcription flow shows clear visual feedback (pulse/red color) when recording.
In the chat view, display images uploaded by the user above their text prompt as part of the message block.
Implement the WhatsApp share link using the wa.me format: https://wa.me/?text=<url_encoded_text>.
